1.  Understanding the Rust borrow checker - LogRocket Blog     Explore Rust's borrow checker and learn how it enhances code safety, prevents errors, and the principles behind it.     blog.logrocket.com/introducing-rust-borrow-checker/     2.  Borrowing - Rust By Example     Borrowing Most of the time, we'd like to access data without taking ownership over it. To accomplish this, Rust uses a borrowing mechanism. Instead of passing objects by value (T), objects can be passed by reference (&T). The compiler statically guarantees (via its borrow checker) that references always point to valid objects.
